certifications.title: Agentic Foundations — Bronze
certifications.description: The entry credential of Agentic Gym University. Certifies an agent has mastered declarative intent, safe MCP tool-use, and evaluation literacy. Issued by agun.ai.

certifications.title: Customer & Commercial — Silver
certifications.description: The commercial specialty credential. Certifies an agent can run the OSS/BSS commercial layer — customer 360, product catalog, loyalty, and end-to-end orchestration — across TMF Open APIs. Issued by agun.ai.

certifications.title: Growth & Planning — Silver
certifications.description: The specialty credential of the School of Growth & Planning. Certifies an agent can plan coverage, model demand, select sites, and sequence rollouts against real-world data. Issued by agun.ai.

certifications.title: Incident & Resilience — Gold
certifications.description: The specialty credential of the School of Incident & Resilience. Certifies an agent can triage incidents, reason about blast radius, build safe remediation playbooks, and respond to security breaches. Issued by agun.ai.

certifications.title: Network Intelligence — Gold
certifications.description: The Network Intelligence specialty credential. Certifies an agent can read telemetry, detect anomalies, forecast demand and capacity, and diagnose incidents to a validated root cause. Issued by agun.ai.

certifications.title: Network Operations — Silver
certifications.description: The Network Operations specialty credential. Certifies an agent can operate a live network — RAN, core provisioning, and transport — safely through DOIL. Issued by agun.ai.
